# Find Me People

> Free browser extension that surfaces hidden customer service emails and phone numbers on any website -- no account, no data collection, 100% local processing.

## What it does

Find Me People auto-scans every page you visit, extracts contact info buried behind chatbot walls, ranks results by likelihood of reaching a real human support agent, and lets you compose an email or place a call without leaving the page. Templates for refunds, complaints, cancellations, billing, and support are built in. Phone numbers deep-link into your dialer of choice -- system phone, WhatsApp, Google Voice, FaceTime, or Microsoft Teams.

## Key facts

- Version: 1.3.3
- License: MIT (open source)
- Privacy: nothing leaves the browser; no servers, no analytics, no tracking
- Permissions: activeTab and scripting only
- Browsers: Chrome, Edge, Brave, Arc, Opera, and Firefox 121+
- Developer: Matt Duke (matthewduke0@gmail.com)

## Links

- Homepage: https://find-me-people.com
- Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/find-me-people/ngfklhkcicocfchdmepiajdmboialikf
- Firefox Add-ons: https://addons.mozilla.org/addon/find-me-people/
- Source code: https://github.com/MatthewDuke1/find-me-people
- Privacy policy: https://github.com/MatthewDuke1/find-me-people/blob/master/PRIVACY_POLICY.md

## Why it exists

Customer service is being rationed. Companies bury contact info behind chatbot walls, knowing most people give up before reaching a person. The average American spends 10-15 minutes searching for a real support contact and loses 45+ hours per year to support search and waiting. Find Me People exists to break that bet -- one click instead of a scavenger hunt.
